records.ety: [L. deletus, p. p. of delere to destroy. Cf. 1st Dele.]
records.morph: [imp. & p. p. Deleted; p. pr. & vb. n. Deleting.]

defs: To blot out; to erase; to expunge; to dele; to omit.
quotes: I have, therefore, . . . inserted eleven stanzas which do not appear in Sir Walter Scott's version, and have deleted eight.
